74237.subject: рҹҹӘ STRCвҖҷs moment of truth?
74237.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f03a31fc-2c5e-45d6-bd19-65971ab1d33b/casper_title.jpg?t=1780689993)
Follow image link: (https://www.casper.network/news/why-casper-for-rwa)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/1e3b4c2c-dbf6-4d04-be2b-ebec309a3bfd/Quote_template_-_Breakdown_NL.png?t=1780956062)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c0bb7116-177f-4e83-be08-0c512d75478c/image.png?t=1780955965)
Caption: 

# STRCвҖҷs moment of truth?

The first banking scandal to be exposed during the Great Financial Crisis was the mis-selling of Auction Rate Securities, or ARS вҖ” fixed-income securities whose yields periodically reset higher to ensure that they trade at par.

The idea is that the yield changes so the price doesnвҖҷt have to.В 

Unfortunately, this gave investors the idea that ARS were a high-yield form of cash.

Banks encouraged this misperception, advising their retail customers to use them as a place to park money they might need on short notice вҖ” for medical expenses or weekly payroll, for example.

One UBS customer put $75,000 of savings earmarked for college tuition into ARS because, she [said](https://www.nytimes.com/2008/11/30/business/30gret.html), вҖң==my broker kept assuring me nothing was safer.вҖқ==

Many, many things were safer. 

As the financial crisis began to unfold, yield resets were no longer enough to keep ARS trading at par. Banks stepped in, maintaining the illusion of stability by buying the ARS themselves. But in February 2008 the crisis was making too many other demands on their balance sheets вҖ” they stopped buying and the market for ARS collapsed. 

Investors who thought they owned a cash-like asset they could always sell at par discovered they owned something they couldn't sell at all.

==The regulatory response came unusually quickly. Just ten months later, Citi and UBS settled an SEC investigation into their marketing of ARS by agreeing to return $30 billion to retail customers.==

It was an open-and-shut case of banking malfeasance. The two investment banks== had вҖңmisrepresented to customers that ARS were safe, highly liquid investments that were comparable to money markets,вҖқ the SEC ==[said](https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2008/2008-290.htm?utm_source=chatgpt.com)==. Financial justice was served and we learned something, too.==

==Unfortunately, every lesson in finance eventually has to be relearned.==

==Recently, Michael Saylor has been targeting the same kind of investors, with the same kind of resetting mechanism, and the same misrepresented sales pitch: STRC is no more like a bank account than ARS ever were.==

==**Pitch v. prospectus**==

Investors who read the [prospectus](https://www.sec.gov/Arch

74235.subject: The Nerdy Escorts Cashing In On Silicon ValleyвҖҷs AI Boom
74235.body:
Forbes P.M.

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Forbes


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Forbes

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/nerdy-escorts-cashing-silicon-valleys-ai-boom-forbes-magazine-l0qoc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st
  
Good evening, 2024 college grad Meida Marek (her online pseudonym) realized AI could soon replace her professional skills. Intelligent and talkative with interests in topics like AI, biohacking and cryptocurrency, she decided to turn that toolkit into a new careerвҖ”and became an escort. Her specialty is high-end companionship for Silicon ValleyвҖҷs most online, most technical clients. HereвҖҷs why the few women specializing in this are having so much success. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images What To Know About TrumpвҖҷs Expected Appearance At TonightвҖҷs Knicks Game TrumpвҖҷs anticipated arrival has heightened security measures so much that ticket holders are asked to arrive two hours early. Joe Raedle via Getty Images How Much Graham Platner, MaineвҖҷs Oyster-Farming Senate Candidate, Is Worth The veteran running a tear-down-the-oligarchy campaign leverages his rural upbringing, but the full story of his net worth is complicated.
РҹСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/nerdy-escorts-cashing-silicon-valleys-ai-boom-forbes-magazine-l0qoc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st
  
      

----------------------------------------

РҰРө РҝРҫРІС–РҙРҫРјР»РөРҪРҪСҸ Рө-РҝРҫСҲСӮРҫСҺ Р°РҙСҖРөСҒРҫРІР°РҪРҫ СғСҮР°СҒРҪРёРәРҫРІС– Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Р”С–Р·РҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ, СҮРҫРјСғ РјРё РІРәР»СҺСҮРёР»Рё СҶСҺ С–РҪС„РҫСҖРјР°СҶС–СҺ https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st

74234.subject: Strategy and BitMine Double Down
74234.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)**[ buys 1,550 BTC for $101M one week after selling 32](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)

* **[BitMine](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)**[ buys 126,971 ETH for $207M, largest weekly buy of 2026](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)

* **[Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)**[ dumps Worldcoin days after pitching its AI-IPO trade](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)

* **[Bybit and Kraken](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-kraken-xstocks-spacex-tokenized-equity-pre-ipo-derivatives-four-venues)**[ add xStocks SpaceX as pre-IPO race reaches four venues](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-kraken-xstocks-spacex-tokenized-equity-pre-ipo-derivatives-four-venues)

* **[200+ crypto firms](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/200-crypto-firms-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act-galaxy-cuts-passage-odds-60-percent)**[ urge CLARITY Senate vote as Galaxy cuts odds to 60%](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/200-crypto-firms-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act-galaxy-cuts-passage-odds-60-percent)

**[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)** bought [1,550 bitcoin for $101.3 million between June 1 and 7](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b), 50 times the 32 BTC the company sold one week earlier, and pushed its cash reserve to $1 billion. The same Monday, **[BitMine Immersion](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)** disclosed its [largest weekly purchase of 2026](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low): 126,971 ETH for $207 million at a $1,630 average, deploying the proceeds of last Thursday's [$300 million STRC-style preferred-stock filing](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/bitmine-brings-strategy-s-strc-playbook-to-an-eth-treasury). The buy lifts BitMine's treasury to 5.54 million ETH, 4.59% of the circulating supply. Both purchases were funded with capital raised in the prior weeks through instruments designed for exactly this trade: issue paper at one price, deploy it at a lower one.

Across the trade, **[Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)** sold his entire Worldcoin position on June 6, completing a weeks-long liquidation across HYPE, NEAR, ZEC, and now WLD вҖ” [three days after Maelstrom publicly pitched Worldcoin](https://thed

74230.subject: The Daily Degen - June 8th, 2026
74230.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
74230.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-8th-2026

Happy Monday good frogs! Start of another big week!
LetвҖҷs get after it!
As alwaysвҖҰ stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottomвҖҰ and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.264T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $717.74
Gold: $4,333.90
Silver: $68.17
Oil (WTI): $90.16
US 10Y Treasury: 4.554%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 15
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Important update regarding our friends at @Balancer [ https://substack.com/redirect/abc01fb8-a7b4-4eb0-9b3a-8d135642554c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - who just introduced an extremely cool new development called AutoRange Pools!
As explained in their recent thread [ https://substack.com/redirect/e9269d45-7c3d-4029-8ad2-cacb623e2106?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]:
вҖңAutoRange Pools are live on Balancer...  
Concentrated liquidity with a range that readjusts on its own, a fungible LP position, and no oracle in the loopвҖҰвҖқ
The gigabrain nature of this development has substantial benefits for DAOвҖҷs and treasuries, passive LPвҖҷs, protocols, and more!
As the thread continues:
вҖңThe same design that makes positions portable keeps the protocol trustless. 
Price comes from the poolвҖҷs own trading activity, not an external feed. 
For protocols, that removes an entire attack vector: no feed to manipulate and no oracle in the critical pathвҖҰвҖқ
Learn more in this great article from BalancerвҖҷs @tiagohansen_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/861093bb-a36c-4fde-a14a-b75fd3183c0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] (see screenshot of first two paragraphs below!)вҖҰ
And as always make sure to follow Balancer on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/abc01fb8-a7b4-4eb0-9b3a-8d135642554c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates, and stay tuned as we keep offering updates on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are quite green today. Best-performing top 50 chain on the monthly is Mezo (#50) at +323%. 
Protocols are mostly green today. Best-performing top 50 protocol on the monthly is Sablier (#4) at +40.01%.

HereвҖҷs The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $1M TVL (from @DefiLlama):

(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at l
